dashboard.monitoringSubtitle: Live financial KPIs, inline recharge approvals, wallet ledger, exports, and an operational chart — data from Prisma; metrics refresh every 60s or on demand.
dashboard.metricsUtcHintFallback: Approved recharges whose updatedAt falls on the current UTC calendar day.
dashboard.bonusDistributedHint: Sum of bonusAmount for approved recharge requests today (UTC).
dashboard.agentLiquidityHint: Sum of wallet balances for users with AGENT role.
dashboard.pendingRechargeHint: Recharge requests in PENDING state need immediate review.
dashboard.noFinancialPermission: You do not have the VIEW_FINANCIALS permission. Financial KPIs, ledger, and exports are hidden.
dashboard.bonusGiftedLifetimeSub: From approved recharge requests (bonusAmount) — wider scope than “today’s bonus”.
dashboard.activeAgentsSub: AGENT accounts in ACTIVE status on the platform.
dashboard.liveLedgerSub: Last 10 movements from WalletLedger — refreshes with metrics every 60 seconds or when you click refresh.
dashboard.exportLedgerSub: Choose the date range for export
dashboard.dateRangeInvalid: Start date must be on or before end date.
dashboard.exportFooterHint: Without dates in the URL, the server exports the last 30 days by default. CSV opens well in Excel.
dashboard.pendingRechargeQueueSub: Prisma-backed queue (PENDING). Approve or reject without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.rechargeNoPermission: You need APPROVE_RECHARGES to use quick actions.
dashboard.quickLaunch1: Review pending agents and send official onboarding messages
dashboard.quickLaunch2: Monitor winner payout queue before official launch
dashboard.quickLaunch3: Keep branding, homepage and promotions aligned

dashboard.rejectionBody: Sorry, the agent declined your request for this reason: {{reason}}
dashboard.pendingSubtitle: Waiting for the agent to set up your GoSport365 account.
dashboard.pendingBody: Your request is being processed. Agent {{agent}} is currently setting up your GoSport365 account.
dashboard.pendingHint: You will be notified when activation is complete — you can refresh this page later.
dashboard.subtitleSummary: Here is your weekly activity summary and your status with your agent.
dashboard.noOrdersYet: You have not placed an order yet
dashboard.pickAgentHint: Tap an agent card to link your account and start topping up right away.

profile.subtitle: Update email, phone, and password; support; request to become an agent.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.supportMessage: Message must be at least 10 characters

complaints.title: Complaints & support
complaints.subtitle: Send a complaint to admins and follow replies in a simple timeline.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Latest updates on your requests, top-ups, and messages from agents.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Choose a request type, then describe the issue. Our team will reply soon.
support.sendSuccess: Your message was sent successfully. Our team will reply shortly.
support.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

winnings.sessionError: Could not verify your session. Refresh the page.
winnings.subtitle: Declare your GoSport365 winnings and enter payout details for admins.
winnings.pendingCaption: Your request is under admin review
winnings.canSubmitNew: You can submit a new request
winnings.amountPlaceholder: Enter the profit amount you want to withdraw

selectAgent.pageSubtitle: Compare ratings and payment methods, then tap “Join now” to link your account.
selectAgent.empty: No agents match these filters right now.
selectAgent.joinFailed: Could not link to the agent

achat.redirectHint: You are being redirected to your assigned agent checkout.

hero.title: Top-up and withdraw your earnings in seconds
hero.description: Connect with verified agents for secure top-ups and withdrawals via Moroccan banks and digital wallets — hassle-free, with instant tracking.
hero.subtitle: GS365 Cash connects you with verified agents for secure top-ups and withdrawals via Moroccan banks and digital wallets — simple, live tracking, and a modern experience.

how.title: How does it work?
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to fast top-ups and withdrawals with your trusted agent.
how.step1Body: Sign up as a player in minutes and verify your email to secure access.
how.step2Body: Browse online agents, compare payment methods, and link your verified agent.
how.step3Body: Submit recharge or withdrawal requests and track status in real time until completion.

roadmap.title: Transaction journey
roadmap.subtitle: A clear flow between player and agent — from selection to completed transfer.

security.title: Security and trust
security.subtitle: Mutual safeguards for both sides of every transaction.
security.playerBody: Transfers through fully verified and trusted agents.
security.agentBody: Advanced anti-fraud checks block duplicate payment proofs and protect your balance.

spotlight.title: Become an agent with us
spotlight.subtitle: Join the verified agent network — the green online indicator shows readiness to receive requests.

recruit.title: Join GS365 Cash as an agent
recruit.subtitle: Grow your customer base, manage top-up and payout requests, and earn recurring income with platform support.

footer.line1: © 2026 GS365 Cash — secure top-ups, verified agents, ongoing support.

login.subtitle: A premium workspace for players, agents, and admins with trilingual support, a modern purchase flow, wallet accounting, and secure order review.
login.toastMissingFields: Enter your username or email and password.

errors.generic: Sign-in failed. Check your details and try again.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Enter a valid username or email and password.
errors.DATABASE_DISABLED: The service is temporarily unavailable (database disabled).
errors.DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: No account found for this email or username.
errors.ACCOUNT_REMOVED: This account is no longer active.
errors.ACCOUNT_INACTIVE: This account cannot sign in right now. Contact support if you need help.
errors.ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: This account is suspended. Contact support.
errors.MAINTENANCE_MODE: Agent sign-in is paused during maintenance. Please try again later.

summary.title: Balance summary before submit
summary.promotionTooltip: The promotion bonus pool resets once admin approves this request.
summary.applyPromotion: Include promotion bonus in this request

invite.step1Hint: Each qualified block unlocks your next milestone bonus according to platform rules.

wallet.historySubtitle: Wallet top-up requests and their status.

dashboardPage.quickRejectConfirm: Reject this recharge request? The agent will be notified.

recharge.pageSubtitle: Review payment proof and approve or reject.
recharge.confirmApprove: You are about to credit {{total}} DH to wallet {{agent}}. Continue?

agentsPage.subtitle: Manage agent accounts, balances, and permissions.
agentsPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
agentsPage.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this agent? This cannot be undone.

users.pageSubtitle: View all accounts, enable or disable accounts, and edit email, username, and role.
users.subtractExceedsMessage: Enable “allow negative balance” if your policy permits it, or reduce the amount.
users.editSubtitle: Update email, username, role, and wallet balance via add or subtract.
users.bonusAuto: Apply {{pct}}% bonus automatically (add only — from platform settings)
users.allowNegative: Allow negative balance (required when deduction exceeds available balance)
users.blockedSubtractHint: Cannot deduct more than available balance unless negative balance is allowed.
users.invalidAmountHint: Enter a valid positive number for the adjustment.

messages.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters

users.changePasswordSubtitle: Set a new login password for {{user}}.

settings.bonusPctInvalid: Bonus percentage must be a number between 0 and 1000
settings.minRechargeInvalid: Minimum recharge must be between 1 and 10,000,000 DH
settings.maxWithdrawInvalid: Max withdrawal must be between 100 and 50,000,000 DH
settings.pageSubtitle: Advanced limits (recharge and withdrawal, promotion bonus merge), recharge bonus, maintenance, and agent dashboard announcement. Use the broadcast page for messages to all users.
settings.minRechargeHint: Lowest amount an agent can request for wallet top-up (treasury recharge requests). Default 1000 DH.
settings.affiliateMergeLabel: Merge promotion rewards into recharge requests
settings.affiliateMergeHint: When off: promotion bonus does not appear on GS365 recharge UI or API merge.
settings.maxWithdrawLabel: Max player profit withdrawal per request (DH)
settings.maxWithdrawHint: Applied to “profit release” requests from the player UI (platform minimum 100 DH remains).
settings.bonusPctHint: Used for wallet recharge requests and manual balance bonus (add-only). Default 10%.
settings.maintenanceHint: When on: agents cannot log in or create recharge requests or add players (403 from server).
settings.announcementHint: Shown at the top of the agent dashboard when not empty.
